identity.name: The Modern Harvest
identity.mission: Bridging the gap between soil and table with transparency and trust.
identity.persona: The Ethical Curator: Grounded, authentic, yet efficiently modern.

primary.name: Dark Moss Green
primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Active States, Key Headings

accent.name: Terracotta
accent.usage: Call to Actions (CTA), Sale Badges, Highlights

buttons.primary: bg-[#2F5233] text-white hover:bg-[#244026] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F5F5F0] text-[#2F5233] hover:bg-[#E0E5DF] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#2F5233] text-[#2F5233] hover:bg-[#2F5233] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300

cards.product: group relative bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-500 border border-transparent hover:border-[#E0E5DF]
cards.dashboard: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-[#E0E5DF] p-6
cards.feature: bg-[#F5F5F0] rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: bg-white border-[#E0E5DF] focus:border-[#2F5233] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2F5233] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 outline-none transition-all duration-200

textures.grain: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 400 400' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

hero.alt: Sun setting over a lush green farm field
hero.description: Used for the main hero background to evoke warmth and organic growth.

farmer_persona.alt: Farmer holding a box of fresh vegetables
farmer_persona.description: Used for the 'Meet the Farmers' section or Farmer Dashboard profile.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for dark colors. Use solid #2F5233.
Do NOT center align the app container. No .App { text-align: center }.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
Backgrounds should never be purely white (#FFFFFF) in large sections; use Warm Sand (#F5F5F0) to break monotony.
Images on mobile must not exceed 80vh height.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install dependencies: npm install framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge lucide-react sonner recharts @studio-freight/react-lenis
2. Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom 'harvest' color palette.
3. Create a 'Layout' component that wraps the app with Lenis scroll smoothing.
4. Build the 'Hero' section using the Bento Grid Mode A.
5. Use the provided image URLs for placeholders. Do not leave empty boxes.
6. Ensure all forms (Login, Signup, Checkout) use Shadcn UI components but styled with the 'inputs' style defined above.
